description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with a prominent sloped roof clad in wood-like material, creating a striking angular profile. The exterior walls are predominantly dark, possibly black or deep gray, with large windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The house sits on a geometric patterned base, suggesting a landscaped or paved area around it. One side of the house includes a partially covered outdoor seating area, visible through the transparent windows. The roof overhangs provide shade and architectural interest, while the overall structure appears to be a single story. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, and the entryway is subtly integrated into the facade, with minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, single-story house with a sloped wooden roof, dark exterior walls, and large asymmetrical windows, set on a geometric patterned base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long sloped roof and a series of windows along the dark facade.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the main entryway and a partially covered outdoor seating area with visible furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows and the continuation of the sloped roof, with more of the geometric base visible.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the roof's angular design and the overall footprint of the house on the patterned base.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entryway with a flush door, no visible steps, and a small overhang integrated into the facade
